creator: blackend@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Aug 05, 2007 at 03:11:12PM +0000, Chess Griffin wrote:
> 
> >Number:         115220
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       Patch to Handbook Printer Section to Add CUPS Configuration

A long time ago, for the (dead) doc TODO
(http://www.freebsd.org/docproj/todo.html) list, I talked with hrs@
about the need of something about CUPS, we reached a consensus about the
fact an extensive article was the best solution instead of a section in
the Handbook.

-- 
Marc
